zh.lifeSummary: 當Elisabeth De Keith於1360年出生在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾阿波時，她的父親Sir William Keith Great Marischal of Scotland52歲，母親Margaret Fraser32歲。她於1380年與Sir Adam De Gordon在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1438年3月16日在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾亨特利享年78歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾卡瓦斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elisabeth De Keith于1360年出生在英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾阿波时，她的父亲Sir William Keith Great Marischal of Scotland52岁，母亲Margaret Fraser32岁。她于1380年与Sir Adam De Gordon在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1438年3月16日在英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾亨特利享年78岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰藍納可爾卡瓦斯。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Keith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the lands of Keith in East Lothian. The placename is derived from British Celtic cait- ‘wood’. In the 17th century numerous bearers of this name settled in Ulster.
German: nickname from Middle High German kīt ‘sprout, offspring’.

History: George Keith (c. 1638–1716), born at Peterhead, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, came to NJ in or before 1685. In 1689 he settled in Philadelphia, where he became headmaster of the school now called the William Penn Charter School. He came into sharp collision with the Quaker leaders in PA and formed a separatist party known as the Christian Quakers, popularly known as ‘Keithians’.

variants.name: Kight
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of   Kite  .

variants.name: Keath
meanings: Scottish and English (mainly Cambridgeshire): variant of   Keith  .

variants.name: Kite
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English kete, kyte ‘kite’ (the bird of prey), perhaps a nickname for a rapacious person.
English: habitational name from one or more of the minor places with names deriving from Old English cȳte, cyte ‘cottage, hut, shed’, such as Kite Farm in Swalecliffe (Kent).

variants.name: Keeth
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Keith  .

variants.name: Keitt
meanings: Possibly an altered form of German   Keith   2.

nameMeanings.name: Elisabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

variants.name: Elizabeth
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Elisabeth De Keith was born in 1360, in Aboyne, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Sir William Keith Great Marischal of Scotland, was 52 and her mother, Margaret Fraser, was 32. She married Sir Adam De Gordon in 1380, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 16 March 1438, in Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 78, and was buried in Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elisabeth De Keith est née en 1360, à Aboyne, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William Keith Great Marischal of Scotland, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Margaret Fraser, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Adam De Gordon en 1380, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 16 mars 1438, à Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterrée à Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elisabeth De Keith 1360 in Aboyne, Aberdeenshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Keith Great Marischal of Scotland 52 und ihre Mutter Margaret Fraser 32. Sie hat 1380 in Scotland Sir Adam De Gordon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 16. März 1438 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth De Keith è nata il nel 1360 nel Aboyne, Aberdeenshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir William Keith Great Marischal of Scotland, aveva 52 anni e sua madre, Margaret Fraser, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Sir Adam De Gordon nel 1380, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 16 marzo 1438, nel Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolta a Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Elisabeth De Keithが1360年にイギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアアボインで生まれた時，父Sir William Keith Great Marischal of Scotlandは52歳，母Margaret Fraserは32歳であった。1380年にスコットランドでSir Adam De Gordonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1438年3月16日にイギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアハントリーで78歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアカーンワスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elisabeth De Keith(이)가 1360년 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르 압이니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Keith Great Marischal of Scotland(은)는 52세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Fraser(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1380년 스컷랜드에서 Sir Adam De Gordon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1438년 3월 16일 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르 헌틀리에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 카른왓h에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth De Keith nasceu em 1360, em Aboyne, Aberdeenshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William Keith Great Marischal of Scotland, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Fraser, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Adam De Gordon em 1380, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 16 de março de 1438, em Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 78 anos, e foi sepultada em Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elisabeth De Keith родилась в 1360 г. в местности абоин, абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir William Keith Great Marischal of Scotland было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Fraser, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Adam De Gordon в 1380 г. в местности Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 16 марта 1438 г. в местности хантли, абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 78 лет и была похоронена в местности карнват, ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elisabeth De Keith nació en 1360, en Aboyne, Aberdeenshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir William Keith Great Marischal of Scotland, tenía 52 años y su mamá, Margaret Fraser, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Sir Adam De Gordon en 1380, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 16 de marzo de 1438, en Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 78 años, y fue sepultada en Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
